description:
Run a multiple linear regression analysis to predict 'Exam' scores based on 'Revise' (time spent revising) and 'Anxiety' (exam anxiety) using the 'ExamAnxiety.csv' dataset. The analysis must include 95% Confidence Intervals for the Model Coefficients. Save the Jamovi analysis to '~/Documents/Jamovi/prediction_model.omv'. Additionally, calculate the predicted Exam score for a student who studied for 10 hours (Revise=10) and has an Anxiety score of 50 (Anxiety=50). Create a text report at '~/Documents/Jamovi/prediction_report.txt' with the following format, rounding all values to 2 decimal places:

Intercept: [value]
Revise_B: [value]
Anxiety_B: [value]
Predicted_Score: [value]
Revise_95_CI_Lower: [value]
